description: The ``Trigger Haptics In Hierarchy`` node takes in a Slot hierarchy and will send out haptic pulses through it.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to send haptic data to the given hierarchy.
fields.TargetHierarchy: The slot hierarchy that specifically looks for your haptic components.
fields.RelativeIntensity: How much this will notify the user using haptics.
fields.Next: Fires after sending the haptic pulse.
